divisions.title: Sin and Judgment
divisions.summary: Humanity's rebellion against God, both Gentiles and Jews are under sin, no one is righteous

divisions.title: Justification by Faith
divisions.summary: Abraham justified by faith, peace with God through Christ, grace abounds over sin

divisions.title: Sanctification
divisions.theme: Dead to sin, alive in the Spirit
divisions.summary: Died with Christ, struggle with sin, life in the Spirit, nothing can separate us from God's love

divisions.title: Israel's Place
divisions.summary: God's sovereignty, Israel's rejection, Gentile inclusion, and future restoration of Israel

divisions.title: Practical Christian Living
divisions.summary: Living sacrifices, love, submission to authorities, accepting the weak and strong, greetings

chapterSummaries.1: Paul's greeting, the power of the gospel, God's wrath against sinful humanity
chapterSummaries.2: God's righteous judgment applies to all, Jews and Gentiles alike
chapterSummaries.3: All have sinned, justification through faith in Jesus Christ
chapterSummaries.4: Abraham justified by faith, not works, righteousness credited through faith
chapterSummaries.5: Peace with God through Christ, justification brings life and hope
chapterSummaries.6: Dead to sin, alive in Christ, slaves to righteousness
chapterSummaries.7: Released from the law, the struggle with sin in the believer
chapterSummaries.8: Life in the Spirit, adoption as children, nothing can separate us from God's love
chapterSummaries.9: God's sovereignty, Israel's rejection, election and mercy
chapterSummaries.10: Israel's unbelief, faith comes by hearing the word of Christ
chapterSummaries.11: The remnant of Israel, Gentiles grafted in, all Israel will be saved
chapterSummaries.12: Living sacrifices, transformed minds, using spiritual gifts, genuine love
chapterSummaries.13: Submission to authorities, love fulfills the law, the day is near
chapterSummaries.14: Accept the weak and strong, do not judge, live for the Lord
chapterSummaries.15: Please your neighbor, Paul's ministry to the Gentiles, travel plans
chapterSummaries.16: Greetings to many believers, warning against divisive people, final benediction
